name: Mahito Encounter
description:
This is a bit of a pickle, isn't it?

I Really don't know what to put here so here is a lyrics to a song

Man I really bet you thought there was about to be song

Oh boy would you be ever so wrong

I ain't no singer, ain't no rapper

I'm just some guy who's totally not a kidnapper

Why you still here? Go try my bot

At least go down and comment about what you thought

With that my friend

I shall end
creator: Its me DustDust Sans. I'm going to kill you, cause I can
